articles.title: “Will I be OK?” Teen died after ChatGPT pushed deadly mix of drugs, lawsuit says
articles.summary: Teen trusted ChatGPT to help him “safely” experiment with drugs, logs show.

articles.title: Microsoft will lean on your CPU to speed up Windows 11's apps and animations
articles.summary: "All modern operating systems do this, including macOS and Linux."

articles.title: Google's Android-powered laptops are called Googlebooks, and they're coming this year
articles.summary: Google has revealed its vision for the AI laptop of tomorrow.

articles.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
articles.summary: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."

articles.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
articles.summary: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

articles.title: Google adds Gemini-powered dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dictation startups
articles.summary: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones.

articles.title: Android adds a feature to stop you from doomscrolling
articles.summary: Google’s new Android feature, Pause Point, forces you to wait before opening distracting apps in an effort to curb addictive scrolling habits.

articles.title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe-code your own widgets
articles.summary: To create a widget, users will be able to describe what they want using natural language. For example, you could ask the feature to "suggest three high-protein meal prep recipes every week" in order to get a custom dashboard that you can add and resize on your home screen.
